sentences.target: Voilà le livre dont je parle.

translations.fr: Voilà le livre dont je parle.
translations.en: Here is the book I'm talking about.
translations.es: Aquí está el libro del que hablo.
translations.de: Hier ist das Buch, von dem ich spreche.
translations.it: Ecco il libro di cui parlo.
translations.ko: 내가 말하던 책이 바로 이 책입니다.
translations.ru: Вот книга, о которой я говорю.
translations.pt: Aqui está o livro de que estou falando.
translations.vi: Đây là cuốn sách mà tôi đang nói đến.
translations.ar: هذا هو الكتاب الذي أتحدث عنه.
translations.nl: Hier is het boek waar ik het over heb.
translations.uk: Ось книга, про яку я говорю.
translations.hu: Itt van a könyv, amiről beszélek.
translations.hi: यह वही किताब है जिसके बारे में मैं बात कर रहा हूँ।
translations.el: Ορίστε το βιβλίο για το οποίο μιλάω.
translations.nb: Her er boken jeg snakker om.
translations.sv: Här är boken som jag pratar om.
translations.cs: Tady je kniha, o které mluvím.
translations.da: Her er bogen, som jeg taler om.
translations.ja: これが私が話している本です。

tokens.explanation: Presentative deictic adverb introducing the noun phrase that follows.
Definite article, masculine singular, determiner of 'livre'.
Common noun, masculine singular, head of the NP presented.
Relative pronoun introducing a relative clause; stands for a 'de' complement (here: complement of 'parler de').
Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; governs a 'de' complement realized by 'dont'.

sentences.target: C’est le câble dont j’ai besoin.

translations.fr: C’est le câble dont j’ai besoin.
translations.en: This is the cable I need.
translations.es: Este es el cable que necesito.
translations.de: Das ist das Kabel, das ich brauche.
translations.it: È il cavo di cui ho bisogno.
translations.ru: Это тот кабель, который мне нужен.
translations.pt: Este é o cabo de que eu preciso.
translations.vi: Đây là sợi cáp tôi cần.
translations.nl: Dit is de kabel die ik nodig heb.
translations.hu: Ez az a kábel, amire szükségem van.
translations.hi: यही वह केबल है जिसकी मुझे जरूरत है।
translations.el: Αυτό είναι το καλώδιο που χρειάζομαι.
translations.id: Ini adalah kabel yang saya butuhkan.
translations.sv: Det här är kabeln jag behöver.
translations.ro: Acesta este cablul de care am nevoie.
translations.da: Dette er kablet, som jeg har brug for.
translations.ja: これが私に必要なケーブルです。

tokens.explanation: Clitic pronoun 'ce' + copular auxiliary 'être' (3sg, present); links subject 'ce' to predicate 'le câble'.
Definite article, masculine singular, determiner of 'câble'.
Common noun, masculine singular, predicate nominal.
Relative pronoun introducing the clause; corresponds to the 'de' complement required by 'avoir besoin de'.
Clitic subject 'je' + lexical verb 'avoir', present indicative, 1st person singular; main verb in the idiom 'avoir besoin de'.
Common noun within the idiom 'avoir besoin de'; denotes the state of needing something introduced by 'dont'.

sentences.target: Tu vois la maison dont ils rêvent.

translations.fr: Tu vois la maison dont ils rêvent.
translations.en: You see the house they dream about.
translations.es: Ves la casa con la que sueñan.
translations.de: Du siehst das Haus, von dem sie träumen.
translations.ko: 너는 그들이 꿈꾸는 집을 보고 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 你看见了他们梦想的那栋房子。
translations.yue: 你見到佢哋夢想嘅嗰間屋。
translations.ru: Ты видишь дом, о котором они мечтают.
translations.pt: Você vê a casa com que eles sonham.
translations.he: אתה רואה את הבית שהם חולמים עליו.
translations.vi: Bạn thấy ngôi nhà mà họ mơ ước.
translations.ar: أنت ترى البيت الذي يحلمون به.
translations.nl: Je ziet het huis waar ze van dromen.
translations.uk: Ти бачиш будинок, про який вони мріють.
translations.hi: तुम वह घर देख रहे हो जिसके बारे में वे सपने देखते हैं।
translations.nb: Du ser huset de drømmer om.
translations.id: Kamu melihat rumah yang mereka impikan.
translations.sv: Du ser huset de drömmer om.
translations.da: Du ser huset, de drømmer om.
translations.ja: あなたは彼らが夢見る家を見ている。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; takes 'la maison' as direct object.
Definite article, feminine singular, determiner of 'maison'.
Common noun, feminine singular, head of the object NP.
Relative pronoun introducing the clause; stands for a 'de' complement required by 'rêver de'.
Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person plural, subject of the relative clause.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; selects a 'de' complement, recovered by 'dont'.

sentences.target: On cherche les clés dont tu parles.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ʃɛʁʃ le kle dɔ̃ ty paʁl/

translations.fr: On cherche les clés dont tu parles.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ʃɛʁʃ le kle dɔ̃ ty paʁl/
translations.en: We’re looking for the keys you’re talking about.
translations.es: Estamos buscando las llaves de las que hablas.
translations.de: Wir suchen die Schlüssel, von denen du sprichst.
translations.it: Stiamo cercando le chiavi di cui parli.
translations.ko: 우리는 네가 말한 열쇠를 찾고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在找你说的那些钥匙。
translations.yue: 我哋喺搵你講嗰啲鎖匙。
translations.ru: Мы ищем ключи, о которых ты говоришь.
translations.pt: Estamos procurando as chaves de que você fala.
translations.he: אנחנו מחפשים את המפתחות שאתה מדבר עליהם.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tìm những chiếc chìa khóa mà bạn đang nói đến.
translations.ar: نحن نبحث عن المفاتيح التي تتحدث عنها.
translations.nl: We zoeken de sleutels waar je het over hebt.
translations.uk: Ми шукаємо ключі, про які ти говориш.
translations.hu: Azokat a kulcsokat keressük, amelyekről beszélsz.
translations.hi: हम उन चाबियों को ढूँढ रहे हैं जिनके बारे में तुम बात कर रहे हो।
translations.el: Ψάχνουμε τα κλειδιά για τα οποία μιλάς.
translations.nb: Vi leter etter nøklene du snakker om.
translations.id: Kami sedang mencari kunci yang kamu bicarakan.
translations.sv: Vi letar efter nycklarna som du pratar om.
translations.da: Vi leder efter nøglerne, som du taler om.
translations.ja: あなたが話している鍵を探しています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun used as subject; grammatically 3rd person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular agreeing with 'on'; transitive, takes 'les clés' as object.
Definite article, plural, determiner of 'clés'.
Common noun, feminine plural, head of the object NP.
Relative pronoun introducing the clause; corresponds to the 'de' complement of 'parler de'.
Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular, subject of the relative clause.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; takes a 'de' complement, recovered by 'dont'.

C’est le câble dont j’ai besoin.
Tu vois la maison dont ils rêvent.
On cherche les clés dont tu parles.

en: Here is the book I'm talking about.
This is the cable I need.
You see the house they dream about.
We’re looking for the keys you’re talking about.
